payload.label: coffee maker
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped glossy black coffee maker with a rounded front, reflective chrome ring at the top and a small blue-lit rectangular panel on the front; appears to be a compact countertop single-cup unit made of glossy plastic and metal, photographed from close range (≈0.5 m).

message.content: {"label":"coffee maker","short_description":"glossy black coffee maker edge-cropped","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped glossy black coffee maker with a rounded front, reflective chrome ring at the top and a small blue-lit rectangular panel on the front; appears to be a compact countertop single-cup unit made of glossy plastic and metal, photographed from close range (≈0.5 m).","attributes":["glossy black finish","reflective chrome ring","blue-lit rectangular panel","rounded/cylindrical front","compact single-cup size","plastic and metal materials","partial/edge-cropped","on dark/reflective surface"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.5}
